text.content:
Ministry

The Serpents

In-Clan Disciplines: Obfuscate, Presence, Protean

Clan Bane

Vulnerability to Light. The Ministry are hypersensitive to light. They take Bane Severity as additional Aggravated damage from sunlight exposure. Bright artificial light (spotlights, high-beam headlights, flashbangs) causes them to suffer a Bane Severity penalty to all dice pools while exposed. Even normal indoor lighting can be uncomfortable, though not penalizing.

Compulsion

Transgression. The vampire is compelled to tempt someone into breaking a moral, ethical, or social rule. They must identify a prohibition the target holds and entice them to violate it — a vow, a law, a taboo, a diet, sobriety, fidelity. The temptation must be genuine and the target must have real choice. Until someone transgresses due to the vampire's influence, they suffer a 2-dice penalty to all rolls.
